# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::Region}-user-uploads'

  S3Policy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: s3-access-policy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFullAccessForApplicationRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub '${AWS::Region}.eks.${AWS::AccountId}'
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'

  S3BucketPolicyAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::PolicyAttachment'
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref S3Role
      PolicyArn: !GetAtt 'S3Policy.Arn'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket.
